feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Impuesto Especifico Combustible Ventas
entry.content:
Estimados:

Ojala puedan ayudarme, me podrían dar experiencias de como han implementado el impuesto especifico de combustible pero en la venta, por ejemplo en una factura de deudores. Ya que como es variable no lo tengo claro, en compras es facil porque puedo editar el impuesto.

SAP Business One

entry.title: Creating a Dynamic Formatted Search Query for Send Message in SAP Business One
entry.content:
I need to create a Formatted Search query for the Subject and Message fields in the Send Message functionality. The query should dynamically retrieve information based on the context in which Send Message is used.

For Example

  • If I execute Send Message from a Goods Receipt PO, the query should fetch the Vendor from the corresponding Goods Receipt PO.
  • If I execute Send Message from a Goods Return, the query should fetch the Vendor from the related Goods Return document.

The query should look more or less like the one below. How do I construct the $[$] syntax to identify the document columns where the Send Message is running?

--$X is the document where the Send Message is displayed
If $[$X.ObjType = 20] --Goods Receipt PO
    BEGIN
        SELECT CardCode from OPDN WHERE DocNum = $[$X.DocNum]
    END
ELSE IF $[$X.ObjType = 21] --Goods Return
    BEGIN
        SELECT CardCode from ORPD WHERE DocNum = $[$X.DocNum]
    END

entry.title: SAP B1 Alerts is not working.
entry.content:
Dear Expert.
In SAP Business Oner alert we are not able to receive the alert.
 
Following is already checked and done.
 
1. Enable Alerts in SLD.
2. Restarted the Messaging service.
3. Restarted Job work services.
 
Please suggest the solution.
 
 
Regards,
Krishna Verma

entry.title: Dear Sir Please Add BOM Price in this Sales Report.
entry.content:
SELECT T0.DocEntry,t0.docnum as 'Invoice No', --T0.[U_CustomersGRNNo],T0.[U_GRDate],


M.[BeginStr] as 'Prerflix',T0.[NumAtCard],
(SELECT Top 1 X.[County] FROM CRD1 X Where T0.CardCode = X.CardCode)as'County',
T0.[DocDate],T0.[CANCELED], T0.[TaxDate], T0.[CardName], a.[ItmsGrpCod], a.[U_ItemSubGroup], a.[SalUnitMsr],
(case when t0.gsttrantyp='GA' then 'GST Tax Invoice'
when t0.gsttrantyp='GD' then 'GST Debit Memo'
else 'Bill Of Supply' end ) as 'Document Type',
--(Select N.[U_BPSubGroup] From OCRD N Where T0.CardCode = N.CardCode)as'BP Sub Group',
t3.bpgstn, t0.paytocode as 'Bill To', t0.shiptocode as 'Ship To', T1.[OcrCode],
(Select top 1 T.[Location] from OLCT T where T.Code=t1.LocCode ) as 'Location',
T3.[BpGSTN] as 'BP GSTIN',

(SELECT Top 1 S.[Name] FROM CRD1 R INNER JOIN OCST S ON R.[State] = S.[Code] Where T0.CardCode = R.CardCode )as'State',
T1.[ItemCode], T1.[Dscription],A.[FrgnName],T1.[Quantity],T1.[U_NoOfPkgs], T1.[U_DNo], T1.[U_QtyInKG], l.ItmsGrpNam, T1.[Weight1],T1.[LineTotal]-(T1.LineTotal*T0.[DiscPrcnt]/100) 'Basic Value',

T1.[PriceBefDi],T1.[Price], T0.[RoundDif],T1.[DiscPrcnt],T0.[DocTotal],-- A.[U_ProductGroup], A.[U_SubGroup],
t2.chapterid,---T8.[DistNumber],T8.[MnfDate], T8.[ExpDate],

--(SELECT X.[U_GST] FROM [@UOM] X where X.[Name] = T1.[unitMsr])as'Unit1', T1.[PackQty],
--(SELECT X.[U_GST] FROM [@UOM] X where X.[Name] = a.[SalPackMsr])as'Unit2',T1.[Quantity], t1.price, T1.[LineTotal]-(T1.LineTotal*T0.[DiscPrcnt]/100) 'Basic Value',

(SELECT top 1 ISNULL(T7.stccode,0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-120 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum)'IGSTRate%',
(SELECT ISNULL(sum(T7.TaxSUm),0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-120 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum and t7.expnscode=-1 )IGSTAmt,

(SELECT top 1 ISNULL(T7.stccode,0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType= 8 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum)'TCSRate%',
(SELECT ISNULL(sum(T7.TaxSUm),0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType= 8 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum and t7.expnscode=-1 )TCSAmt,

(SELECT top 1 ISNULL(T7.stccode,0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-100 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum)'CGSTRate%',
(SELECT ISNULL(sum(T7.TaxSUm),0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-100 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum and t7.expnscode=-1 )CGSTAmt,

(SELECT top 1 ISNULL(T7.stccode,0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-110 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum)'SGSTRate%',
(SELECT ISNULL(sum(T7.TaxSUm),0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-110 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum and t7.expnscode=-1 )SGSTAmt,

 

(case when t1.VisOrder=0 then
(select sum(distinct t.basesum) from inv4 t where t.expnscode in (1,2,3,4) and t.docentry=t0.docentry)
when t1.VisOrder>=1 then 0 end) as 'Freight Amt',

(case when t1.VisOrder=0 then
(select sum( t.taxsum) from inv4 t where t.expnscode in (1,2,3,4) and t.docentry=t0.docentry)
when t1.VisOrder>=1 then 0 end) as 'Freight Tax Amt',

(case when t1.VisOrder=0 then
(select top 1 t.stccode from inv4 t where t.expnscode in (1,2,3,4) and t.docentry=t0.docentry)
when t1.VisOrder>=1 then '' end) as 'Freight Tax Rate',


T1.[LineTotal],H.[SlpName],T1.[AcctCode],T0.[U_VehicleNo], T0.[U_Destination],T0.[U_Transporter],T0.[U_LRNo], T0.[U_LRDate], T0.[U_Ewaybill], T0.[U_TransporterGST]

 

 


FROM dbo.OINV T0
INNER JOIN dbo.INV1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry]
INNER JOIN NNM1 M ON T0.[Series] = M.[Series]
LEFT JOIN dbo.OITM a ON T1.[ItemCode] = a.[ItemCode]
LEFT JOIN dbo.OITB l on a.ItmsGrpCod = l.ItmsGrpCod
LEFT JOIN dbo.OCHP T2 ON T1.HsnEntry = T2.[AbsEntry]
LEFT JOIN dbo.inv12 t3 on t0.docentry=t3.docentry
INNER JOIN dbo.OLCT T4 ON T1.[LocCode] = T4.[Code]
LEFT JOIN DLN1 T5 ON T1.BaseEntry = T5.DocEntry And T5.BaseLine = T1.LineNum AND T1.WhsCode=T5.WhsCode AND T1.ItemCode=T5.ItemCode
LEFT JOIN ODLN T6 ON T5.DocEntry = T6.DocEntry
INNER JOIN OSLP H ON T0.[SlpCode] = H.[SlpCode]
--left outer join IBT1 I1 on T1.ItemCode=I1.ItemCode and (T5.DocEntry=I1.BaseEntry and T5.ObjType=I1.BaseType)
--left outer join OBTN T8 on T8.ItemCode=I1.ItemCode and I1.BatchNum=T8.DistNumber
LEFT JOIN WTR1 T16 On T16.DocEntry=T1.BaseEntry and T16.LineNum=T1.BaseLine
--left outer join IBT1 I11 on T1.ItemCode=I11.ItemCode and (T16.DocEntry=I11.BaseEntry and T16.ObjType=I11.BaseType)
--left outer join OBTN T18 on T18.ItemCode=I11.ItemCode and I11.BatchNum=T18.DistNumber


WHERE T4.[GSTRegnNo] =[%2] and T0.[DocDate] >=[%0] AND T0.[DocDate] <=[%1] and T0.Canceled = 'N' AND T0.GSTTranTyp NOT IN('GD')

ORDER BY T0.[DocDate],T0.[DocNum]

entry.title: SAP SDK change item group without changing item master data
entry.content:
In B1, if an user changes the item group, he get's a message "Do you want to update the item information (including UoM group)according to the selected item group?" and the user can answer No and B1 will not copy the data that is in the item group to the item master data. 

I want the same but using SDK. I have a program that uploads data from a XML file and I don't want to update the MRP data that is in the item master data with the data that is in the item group.

Basically I want to answer this  "Do you want to update the item information (including UoM group)according to the selected item group?" with a No but in SDK.

How can I do it?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Payment Means Icon is missing from a 4k screen
entry.content:
On one user, the "Payment Means" Icon does not appear in the lower right corner of the A/P Invoice screen. The monitor is a Dell U321Q resolution is set at 3840x2160. We tried all different resolutions on the monitor as well as adjusting the scaling within windows. The icon doesn't appear at all at any resolution or scaling setting. On the same pc we logged a different user and the icon did not appear. We logged on a different pc as the user that has the issue, the icon appears. We have tried uninstalling and reinstalling SAP B1 on the PC that didn't work either. If you hover over where it should be and click the mouse the payment means screens shows.

Is there a issue with SAP B1 working on a 32" 4k screen?

entry.title: Production Order Stored Procedure Blocking Issue for Production
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I'm using following Stored procedure to block updating Planned qty in production order 
but this stored procedure is blocking users from entering Issue for Production that includes machine or labour

 
IF @object_type='202' AND @transaction_type = 'U'
 
Begin
 
IF EXISTS (SELECT T0.DocEntry
FROM OWOR T0 
inner join WOR1 T1 on t0.docentry = t1.docentry
inner join AWOR T2 on t2.DocEntry =t0.DocEntry 
inner join AWO1 T3 on t3.LogInstanc = T2.LogInstanc and t3.DocEntry=t2.DocEntry and t1.LineNum =t3.LineNum and t1.ItemCode = t3.ItemCode
WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del 
and T2.status ='R'
and T0.Status = 'R'
and T0.ItemCode like 'F%'
and t0.UserSign2 != '1'
and t3.LogInstanc = (Select MAX(AWO1.loginstanc) from AWO1 where AWO1.docentry =@list_of_cols_val_tab_del )
AND T0.CreateDate > '20241111'
GROUP BY T0.DocEntry
   HAVING SUM(T1.PlannedQty) <> SUM(T3.PlannedQty)
)
 
BEGIN
 
SET @error = 2023021501
SET @error_message = 'Not authorized to Update Planned Qty in  Released Production Order'
 
END
 
END

entry.title: Both "Inactive" and "Active" are set to "No"; set at least one of them to "Yes" [OCRD.validFor][line
entry.content:
Dear all,

While uploading email address of business partner then DTW is showing error like Both "Inactive" and "Active" are set to "No"; set at least one of them to "Yes" [OCRD.validFor][line: 0]65171

 

SAP Business One 10.0 SQL Version, DTW

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: how to Change default browser in SAP Business One?
entry.content:
Hello community,

I'm trying to add Power BI report inside SAP B1 client using the Browser functionality, but it's not running, just showing the PBI logo, as per the result I reached to, it's because SAP B1 uses Internet Explorer as the default browser,

I tried to change browser default on the Windows server level from IE to Chrome, and it's updated fully, but still getting the same behavior, because SAP still uses IE not Chrome.

If we test the default browser on the server level we can see it's Chrome:

and even from the Default programs we can see it's Chrome as well:

so how we can change SAP B1 browser default?

 

 

 

System Details: 
1. SAP Business One 9.3 PL 10
2. Database: SQL Server 2014
3. Server: Windows Server 2019

 

Kenan JADDENE

entry.title: how to Change default browser in SAP Business One?
entry.content:
Hello community,

I'm trying to add Power BI report inside SAP B1 client using the Browser functionality, but it's not running, just showing the PBI logo, as per the result I reached to, it's because SAP B1 uses Internet Explorer as the default browser,

I tried to change browser default on the Windows server level from IE to Chrome, and it's updated fully, but still getting the same behavior, because SAP still uses IE not Chrome.

If we test the default browser on the server level we can see it's Chrome:

and even from the Default programs we can see it's Chrome as well:

so how we can change SAP B1 browser default?

System Details: 
1. SAP Business One 9.3 PL 10
2. Database: SQL Server 2014
3. Server: Windows Server 2019

Kenan JADDENE

entry.title: Updating Opportunity Screen in summary tab in SAP B1 using DI API - Document type, Document Number
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to update standard Fields of  summary tab in Opportunity Screen .but I was not able to recognize the field names in di api posting suggestion list for Document type, Document Number fields. 

Here is my DI API Code :

try
{
SAPbobsCOM.SalesOpportunities Opportunity = (SAPbobsCOM. SalesOpportunities)_company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oSalesOpportunities);
if (Opportunity.GetByKey(opportunityId)){
SAPbobsCOM.SalesOpportunitiesLines opportunitiesLines = Opportunity.Lines;

foreach (var stage in post){
if (stage.status = "WON"){
Opportunity. Status =BoSoOsStatus.sos_Sold;
}
if (stage.status = "LOST"){
Opportunity. Status =BoSoOsStatus.sos_Rissed;
Opportunity. Reasons. Reason= stage.decripId;
}
//Opportunity.Lines.DocumentType= SAPbobsCOM.BoAPARDocumentTypes.bodt Quotation;
//Opportunity.OriginType =SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes oQuotations;
//opportunitiesLines. DocumentType =SAPbobsCOM.BoAPARDocumentTypes.bodt Quotation;
// Opportunity.LinkedDocument Number =;
Opportunity.Update();
}
int resultCode= Opportunity.Update();
if (resultCode != 0){
responseMessage = _company. GetLastErrorDescription();
}else{
responseMessage= ApplicationConstants.success_message;
}
}
I have tried using the provided suggestion for targeting the fields but it didn't update the values in Document type or Document Number
SAP Community SAP Cloud for Customer add-ins

entry.title: Inventory Transfer Referenced Document not showing in Relationship Map
entry.content:
Hi All

Any idea why after updated Referenced Document in Transaction entry, it is not showing in Relationship Map as described in Online Documentation?  Is their any special condition to be met?


Referenced Document (<Number of Linked Reference Documents>)
Choose to open the Reference Information window. In this window, you can specify the reference documents for the current document and view the documents that reference the current document.


•Document Referenced To tab:

Lets you specify other documents across different business modules as the reference documents for your current document


•Document Referenced By tab:

Lets you see which documents are using the current document as a reference


To specify a reference document for the current document, proceed as follows:


1.Go to the Document Referenced To tab, choose Transact. Type and select a document type.


2.In the Doc. Number field, specify the document number.


3.Choose Update.


After you add the document, you can view and track the document in the Relationship Map.

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: AP Credit note TDS amount not showing in pick TDS entry of TDS option of outgoing Payment screen
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
     We have created AP Invoice with TDS amount in it.
When in Outgoing payment of TDS, AP Credit note TDS amount not showing in pick TDS entry of TDS option of outgoing Payment screen.
Please suggest why it is not showing in the list.
 
 
Regards,
Krishna Verma

entry.title: B1IF: Call POST http in json format with error
entry.content:
Hi There,

I would like to perform an http call in json format to call an API that is exposed.
And it work fine in Postman.
See screenshot:

And I refer to this post create a B1if scenario
B1if: How to call PUT Http in json format
The step is, see attachment (step.xml).

And I got the below error:

<Payload Role="C" id="atom1" statusNo="HTTP400" statusMsg="Bad Request" reference="atom3" sysid="" payload="atom3" throwException="false">
<http.header/>
<httaError xmlns="urn:com.sap.b1i.xcellerator:upltdoc" HTTPcode="400" HTTPmsg="Bad Request">
<exceptionMsg>com.sap.b1i.xcellerator.XcelleratorException: XCE212 Error while performing HTTP call; HTTP status is 400, Bad Request</exceptionMsg>
<returnData><!DOCTYPE HTML PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD HTML 4.01//EN""http://www.w3.org/TR/html4/strict.dtd"> <HTML><HEAD><TITLE>Bad Request</TITLE> <META HTTP-EQUIV="Content-Type" Content="text/html; charset=us-ascii"></HEAD> <BODY><h2>Bad Request - Invalid Header</h2> <hr><p>HTTP Error 400. The request has an invalid header name.</p> </BODY></HTML> </returnData>
</httaError>
</Payload>

 

Any suggestion?

BR

Robin

entry.title: Logs Deletion (Integration Framework) - SAP B1
entry.content:
Is there any way to automate the logs deletion ? as I got the request below from my customer

 

Customer Request:

I would like to inform you that the log deletion process is currently taking around 1.5 to 2 hours to complete. This duration is too long, and it is not feasible to ask the shop to halt operations for such an extended period.
 
We urgently need an automated log deletion process that can run without disrupting daily operations. This would significantly improve efficiency and minimize downtime.
***End of Customer Request***
 

Also the logs he use to delete are "Message Logs" , "Debug Logs" , "B1 Events Logs" related to "SAP Business One" and "SAP Customer Checkout"

And currently the customer delete the logs from the Integration framework, there is option of log mass deletion and from control center Tlog delete, they are deleting cancelled status transaction and then clicked BizStore GC and clicked on submit

entry.title: Unable to edit existing ABA files in SAP Business One.
entry.content:
Unable to edit existing ABA files in SAP Business One.

 

Step 1 : Open File format Setup window

 

Step2 : Right click on SAPBPAUOPBT_BECS  .

Step 3: Click on Download format project

Step 4 :  System giving warning  File format not assigned yet [Message 10003683-15].

There is no option to assign a system format directly. I want to edit the SAPBPAUOPBT_BECS system format and create a new one. Please guide me on how to edit SAPBPAUOPBT_BECS or share the SAPBPAUOPBT_BECS.BPP file.

entry.title: Update G/L Accounts according to new UDF data?
entry.content:
Update G/L Accounts according to new UDF data?

Can i disable this message or give permanent instruction to set yes always.
SAP B! version of HANA 10.0

entry.title: How to configuration Certificate use SSL Web Dispatcher V.10 2405 ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I need a best practices configuration Certificate to use SSL for Web Dispatcher on SAP Business One V.10 PL2405.
I follow up on the user manual SAP Business One Administrator's Guide Document Version: 2.5 – 2024-05-31  (page 180: 1.11.4.3.4 Server Tools Components)
I use SAP Business One 10.0 2405 on SQL Server and follow up from user manual after configuration Certificate it's cannot active HTTPS not secure.
Please recomend.

Thank you
Worapong

entry.title: Guidance on Generating SSL Certificate and CSR for SAP Business One Web Client Configuration
entry.content: Does SAP provide a tool or guidelines for generating an SSL certificate and CSR to configure the SAP Business One Web Client? The customer requires SSL (https://) for their B1 Web Client, using a domain like https://www.domainName.com . If available, could you please share guidance on this process?

entry.title: "invalid report file path" error shown & it is resolved after restart SAP
entry.content:
User is facing "invalid report file path" error message & it is resolved once restart SAP

User is facing repeatedly same problem

What should i do ?
